title: EEG: First Episode Psychosis vs. Control Resting Task 2
description: This dataset comprises resting-state EEG recordings from two independent samples of first-episode psychosis (FEP) patients and healthy controls. EEG data were acquired using a 60-channel 10-10 montage system for 5-minute resting periods. The dataset includes comprehensive clinical assessments (BPRS, SANS, SAPS, GAF, SFS, MATRICS, WASI) and medication information, enabling investigation of cortical network abnormalities in early psychosis.
methods_description: Resting EEG data were recorded for 5 minutes using an Elekta Neuromag Vectorview system with a low-impedance 60-channel 10-10 montage cap. This represents the second independently collected sample, with specific subjects excluded due to overlap with the first acquisition.
